mapper.update: update base_organization_function set state = #{bean.state}, parent_sale_org_id=#{bean.parentSaleOrgId}, default_receive_org_id=#{bean.receiveOrgId}, default_settlement_org_id=#{bean.settleOrgId}, default_stock_org_id=#{bean.stockOrgId}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_date= #{bean.modifiedDate} where org_id = #{bean.orgId} and function_type=#{bean.funcType}

update base_organization_function set default_settlement_org_id=#{bean.settleOrgId}, default_stock_org_id=#{bean.stockOrgId}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_name = #{bean.modifiedName}, modified_date = #{bean.modifiedDate} where id = #{bean.id}
mapper.sql: function_type, state, org_id, parent_sale_org_id, default_receive_org_id, default_settlement_org_id, default_stock_org_id, created_by, created_name, created_date
